description: Minimal harness pipeline validation project. Backend: FastAPI + SQLite. Frontend: Vue 3 + Vite proxying to backend. Tests the full init→implement→verify loop.

features.name: Backend Scaffold
features.description: Create a minimal FastAPI backend. Required in backend/requirements.txt: fastapi, uvicorn[standard], sqlalchemy, pytest, httpx, anyio[trio]. Create backend/app/main.py with a FastAPI instance, CORS middleware allowing http://localhost:5173, and GET /api/health returning {"status":"ok"}. Create backend/app/database.py with SQLAlchemy SQLite engine (file: backend/data.db), Base = declarative_base(), SessionLocal, and a get_db() generator. Create backend/tests/conftest.py with an httpx AsyncClient fixture using ASGITransport and an in-memory SQLite DB (override get_db dependency). Create backend/tests/test_health.py that asserts GET /api/health returns 200 and {"status":"ok"}. Mark the conftest.py fixture with @pytest.mark.anyio so async tests work.
acceptance_criteria: backend/requirements.txt exists with fastapi, uvicorn[standard], sqlalchemy, pytest, httpx, anyio[trio]

verify_commands.name: Backend import smoke
verify_commands.command: python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'backend'); import app.main; print('ok')"

features.name: Frontend Scaffold
features.description: Create a Vue 3 + Vite frontend scaffold. From the project root run: npm create vite@latest frontend -- --template vue. Then cd frontend && npm install && npm install axios. In frontend/vite.config.js add a server.proxy entry mapping /api to http://localhost:8000. Create frontend/src/api/client.js as an axios instance with baseURL '/api'. The build must complete: npm run build --prefix frontend. Do NOT mount the frontend in FastAPI — they are separate dev servers.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/package.json exists with vue and vite dependencies
npm run build --prefix frontend completes without error

features.name: Item CRUD
features.description: Add an Item resource. Create backend/app/models/item.py with SQLAlchemy model Item(id INTEGER PK, name TEXT NOT NULL, done BOOLEAN default False). Create backend/app/routers/items.py with: GET /api/items (list all, returns list of {id, name, done}), POST /api/items body {name: str} (create, returns 201 + item), DELETE /api/items/{id} (delete, returns 204). Register router in main.py with prefix='/api'. Call Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine) in app startup (use @app.on_event('startup') or lifespan). Create backend/tests/test_items.py testing list (empty returns []), create (returns 201 + item), and delete (returns 204).
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/items {"name": "test"} returns 201 with the created item

features.name: Item List UI
features.description: Build the Vue 3 item list feature. Create frontend/src/components/ItemList.vue: fetches GET /api/items on mount via the axios client, displays items in a <ul> with each item's name and a Delete button (calls DELETE /api/items/{id} then re-fetches). Create frontend/src/components/AddItem.vue: a form with a text input and Submit button that calls POST /api/items then emits 'added'. Update frontend/src/App.vue to compose AddItem and ItemList together. The page title (in App.vue or index.html) should be 'Pipetest'. npm run build must still pass.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build --prefix frontend completes without error
